violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee's single-use gloves were not discarded after being damaged or soiled. Observed food employee wash hands with gloves on them. Gloves should be removed if they are soiled and hands washed before putting on a new pair of gloves.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee drinks were observed in the refrigerated preparation table and on a shelf with clean equipment. Personal items should be stored separately from items used for food service.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
